name: @harness/realtime
description: ISSUE-076 — the client-side data-freshness contract for the dashboard (C7 FR-7.RTP.001–004 / NFR-OBS.014 / NFR-PERF.011). Exactly TWO Supabase Realtime surfaces (approval queue + notification centre); everything else on configurable per-surface polling read from config_values; a per-silo Realtime connection budget that DEGRADES extra subscriptions to polling BEFORE the cap (never a silent freeze), with the two trust-critical surfaces prioritised (last to degrade) and the degrade surfaced as a health signal; honest subscription lifecycle (teardown on unmount, reconnect-or-fall-back-to-polling, honest Live/Reconnecting/Polling indicator); the Realtime filter carries NO client_slug predicate (ADR-001 §3, reconciliation #1). Port + in-memory fake reference model; supabase-store.ts is the live pg adapter authored to the DDL (reads notification/task_queue states + config_values — NO new table) — NOT run live.
